Package glide.api.models.configuration

Class BaseSubscriptionConfiguration.BaseSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder<B extends BaseSubscriptionConfiguration.BaseSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder<B,​C>,​C extends BaseSubscriptionConfiguration>

    public abstract static class BaseSubscriptionConfiguration.BaseSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder<B extends BaseSubscriptionConfiguration.BaseSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder<B,​C>,​C extends BaseSubscriptionConfiguration>

      • callback

        public B callback​(BaseSubscriptionConfiguration.MessageCallback callback,
                  java.lang.Object context)
        Set a callback and a context.
        Parameters:
        callback - The callback. This can be null to unset the callback.
        context - The context.

      • callback

        public B callback​(BaseSubscriptionConfiguration.MessageCallback callback)
        Set a callback without context. null will be supplied to all callback calls as a context.
        Parameters:
        callback - The callback. This can be null to unset the callback.
